Terms and Conditions

Last updated: 16.04.2024

At TabiCat, we believe in empowering travelers to explore the world with confidence and ease. Whether you're an experienced globetrotter or embarking on your first adventure, we're here to provide you with the tools, resources, and support you need to make every journey unforgettable.

AGREEMENT TO OUR LEGAL TERMS

We are Coincidence Inc. ("Company", "we", "us", or "our"). We operate this website (the "Site"), as well as any other related products and services that refer or link to these legal terms (the "Legal Terms") (collectively, the "Services").

These Legal Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and Coincidence Inc. By accessing the Services, you agree that you have read, understood, and accepted these Legal Terms.

The Services are intended for users who are at least 18 years old. Persons under 18 must obtain consent from a legal guardian.

1. OUR SERVICES

The Services are not intended for distribution where prohibited by law.

2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY RIGHTS

All content and trademarks remain the property of Coincidence Inc.

3. USER REPRESENTATIONS

You agree that you are legally capable and will comply with all laws.

4. PRODUCTS

All products are subject to availability and change.

5. PURCHASES AND PAYMENT

Payments must be completed before booking confirmation.

6. REFUNDS POLICY

Refunds are issued according to UK consumer law.

7. PROHIBITED ACTIVITIES

Unauthorized activities are strictly prohibited.
